SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAGONFELD, LISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HWANG, ELIZABETH CHEN, CHUN YI AKA ELAINE CHEN $3,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,010.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JAMIE PARK IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANTS ELIZABETH HWANG AND CHAN YI CHEN (AKA ELAINE CHEN) SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT, KARIN HSU, SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF -0- ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
